store_info.description_short: Self-hosted, open-source ChatGPT-style chat UI for many AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, local models) with agents, search and file uploads.
description_long: LibreChat is an open-source, self-hostable AI chat platform with a familiar ChatGPT-style interface. Instead of locking you to a single provider, it lets you connect and switch between many AI models — OpenAI (GPT), Anthropic (Claude), Google Gemini, Mistral, Groq, OpenRouter, and local/self-hosted models — all from one UI, using your own API keys.
Beyond plain chat it bundles AI agents, file uploads, image generation, message search, conversation presets and forking, and OpenAPI "Actions" for tool use.
It is MIT-licensed and free to self-host; the only costs are whatever the underlying AI providers charge for their APIs (or zero, if you point it at local models).
hint: On first visit, create your account on the registration screen — the first registered user is your LibreChat login.

Pick a provider (OpenAI, Anthropic or Google) in the model selector and paste your own API key when prompted — it's stored encrypted on your shard. Models then appear; agents are built in-app via the Agents endpoint (no keys baked in, you bring your own).
File-retrieval (RAG) features are not enabled in this build; chat, model switching and search work out of the box.
